title: “I regret doing it”: Sykkuno breaks silence on cheating controversy and shares emotional update on girlfriend
summary_full: Sykkuno returned to Twitch on June 3, 2026, after a break following a cheating controversy. During his comeback stream, he admitted that his actions toward his girlfriend were “horrible” and said he spent months trying to repair their relationship. He shared that they are now happier together, thanked supporters, and said the experience helped him grow.
